name: Besiktas Futbol Yatirimlari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Besiktas Futbol Yatirimlari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. engages in professional football activities in Turkey. It also invests in professional football teams; and establishes and operates football facilities. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
